de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics

Class EqualityConstraint

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics.EqualityConstraint
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Constraint
    Deprecated.

    @Deprecated
public class EqualityConstraint
extends java.lang.Object
implements Constraint
    This class implements a persistent constraint. The constraint contains pairs of Metavariables X and Terms t meaning X=t. It offers services like joining two Constraint objects, adding new constraints to this one by unfying two terms and creating all necessary Metavariable - Term pairs. There are no public constructors to build up a new Constraint use the BOTTOM constraint of the Constraint interface (static final class variable) and add the needed constraints. If a constraint would not be satisfiable (cycles, unification failed) the Constraint TOP of interface Constraint is returned.

        public final boolean isBottom()

        Returns:
        true if Bottom

      • isSatisfiable

        public final boolean isSatisfiable()
        Deprecated. 
        a constraint being instance of this class is satisfiable. If a method realizes that an unsatisfiable Constraint would be built because of failed unification, cycle or s.th. similar it returns the singleton TOP being instance of the subclass Top
        Specified by:
        isSatisfiable in interface Constraint
        Returns:
        true always

      • restrictedMetavariables

        public java.util.Iterator<Metavariable> restrictedMetavariables()
        Deprecated. 
        Returns:
        list of metavariables, instantiations of which may restricted by this constraint

      • getDirectInstantiation

        public Term getDirectInstantiation(Metavariable p_mv)
        Deprecated. 
        Returns:
        The most general known term that is more defining than p_mv itself by which p_mv can be replaced if the constraint is valid (or null if the constraint allows arbitrary instantiations of p_mv). This is just the entry of map.

      • getInstantiation

        public Term getInstantiation(Metavariable p_mv,
                             Services services)
        Deprecated. 
        Find a term the given metavariable can be instantiated with which is consistent with every instantiation that satisfies this constraint (that means, the term such an instantiation substitutes the metavariable with can always be unified with the returned term).
        Specified by:
        getInstantiation in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        p_mv - the Metavariable
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        a term the given metavariable can be instantiated with

      • unify

        public Constraint unify(Term t1,
                        Term t2,
                        TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        unifies terms t1 and t2
        Specified by:
        unify in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        t1 - Term to be unified
        t2 - term to be unified
        services - the Services providing access to the type model (e.g. necessary when introducing intersection sorts)
        Returns:
        TOP if not possible, else a new constraint with after unification of t1 and t2

      • unify

        public Constraint unify(Term t1,
                        Term t2,
                        TermServices services,
                        BooleanContainer unchanged)
        Deprecated. 
        executes unification for terms t1 and t2.
        Specified by:
        unify in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        t1 - Term to be unfied
        t2 - Term to be unfied
        services - the Services providing access to the type model (e.g. necessary when introducing intersection sorts)
        unchanged - true iff the new constraint equals this one
        Returns:
        TOP if not possible, else a new constraint unifying t1 and t2 ( == this iff this subsumes the unification )

      • equals

        public boolean equals(java.lang.Object obj)
        Deprecated. 
        checks equality of constraints by subsuming relation (only equal if no new sorts need to be introduced for subsumption)
        Specified by:

      • isAsStrongAs

        public boolean isAsStrongAs(Constraint co)
        Deprecated. 
        Specified by:
        isAsStrongAs in interface Constraint
        Returns:
        true iff this constraint is as strong as "co", i.e. every instantiation satisfying "this" also satisfies "co".

      • isAsWeakAs

        public boolean isAsWeakAs(Constraint co)
        Deprecated. 
        Specified by:
        isAsWeakAs in interface Constraint
        Returns:
        true iff this constraint is as weak as "co", i.e. every instantiation satisfying "co" also satisfies "this".

      • join

        public Constraint join(Constraint co,
                       TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        joins the given constraint with this constraint and returns the joint new constraint.
        Specified by:
        join in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        co - Constraint to be joined with this one
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        Returns:
        the joined constraint

      • join

        public Constraint join(Constraint co,
                       TermServices services,
                       BooleanContainer unchanged)
        Deprecated. 
        joins constraint co with this constraint and returns the joint new constraint. The BooleanContainer is used to wrap a second return value and indicates a subsumption of co by this constraint.
        Specified by:
        join in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        co - Constraint to be joined with this one
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        unchanged - the BooleanContainers value set true, if this constraint is as strong as co
        Returns:
        the joined constraint
